search.query: * |  select  ProductCode as pro   from(select DISTINCT  ProductCode   as ProductCode  from instance_bill)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * |  select round(diff[1],2),round(diff[2] ,2), round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from(select compare("Yesterday's_expenses",2592000) as diff from(  select round(coalesce(sum(PretaxAmount),0),3) as "Yesterday's_expenses" from instance_bill where productcode like '%%'))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * |  select round(diff[1],2),round(diff[2] ,2), round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from(select compare("Yesterday's_expenses",2592000) as diff from(  select round(coalesce(sum(PretaxAmount),0),3) as "Yesterday's_expenses" from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}'))

A.compareValueDescription: Maximum Daily Expenses (Compared with Last Month)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * |  select  coalesce(cast( round(diff[1],2) as varchar),'No data'),round(diff[2] ,2),round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from( select compare("Maximum_daily_expenses",2592000) as diff from( select round(max(this_month),2) as "Maximum_daily_expenses" from ( select  date_trunc('day',__time__) as day,  sum(  PretaxAmount ) as "this_month" from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day)))
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * |  select  coalesce(cast( round(diff[1],2) as varchar),'No data'),round(diff[2] ,2),round(diff[3]*100-100,2)  from( select compare("Maximum_daily_expenses",2592000) as diff from( select round(max(this_month),2) as "Maximum_daily_expenses" from ( select  date_trunc('day',__time__) as day,  sum(  PretaxAmount ) as "this_month" from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day)))

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select case when rnk > 6 or pretaxamount <=0  then 'Other' else ProductName end as ProductName ,  sum(PretaxAmount)  as PretaxAmount from(select * ,row_number() over(order by pretaxamount desc )as rnk from( select ProductName, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by ProductName) ) group by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select case when rnk > 6 or pretaxamount <=0  then 'Other' else ProductName end as ProductName ,  sum(PretaxAmount)  as PretaxAmount from(select * ,row_number() over(order by pretaxamount desc )as rnk from( select ProductName, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount  from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by ProductName) ) group by ProductName order by PretaxAmount desc limit 1000

basicOptions.displayName: Daily Expenses and Trend Forecast (Current Month)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *|   select date_format(res.stamp,'%b %e, %Y') as time ,res.real as "Actual_expenses",case when is_nan(res.real) then res.pred else null end  as "Forecast_expenses",res.instances from(select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'],86400,60) as res from ( select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day  order by day)  ) where day < lastday )) limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *|   select date_format(res.stamp,'%b %e, %Y') as time ,res.real as "Actual_expenses",case when is_nan(res.real) then res.pred else null end  as "Forecast_expenses",res.instances from(select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'],86400,60) as res from ( select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day  order by day)  ) where day < lastday )) limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *| select date_format(__time__,'%b %e, %Y') as "Date", round(sum(pretaxamount),3)  as "Expenses"    from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by "Date" order by "Date"
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *| select date_format(__time__,'%b %e, %Y') as "Date", round(sum(pretaxamount),3)  as "Expenses"    from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by "Date" order by "Date"

basicOptions.displayName: Daily Bills and Growth Rate (Last 3 Months)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * |   select date_format(day,'%b %e, %Y') as day, total as "Daily_expenses" from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day order by day)
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * |   select date_format(day,'%b %e, %Y') as day, total as "Daily_expenses" from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day order by day)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *  | select day, round(sum(total),3) as total, case when rnk <=5 then ProductName else 'Other' end as ProductName from(select day,total,ProductName, rank() over(partition by day order by total desc) as rnk from(select date_format(day,'%b %e, %Y') as day, total,ProductName from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,ProductName from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day,ProductName order by day)))  group by day, ProductName order by day  limit 10000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *  | select day, round(sum(total),3) as total, case when rnk <=5 then ProductName else 'Other' end as ProductName from(select day,total,ProductName, rank() over(partition by day order by total desc) as rnk from(select date_format(day,'%b %e, %Y') as day, total,ProductName from( select date_trunc('day',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,ProductName from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day,ProductName order by day)))  group by day, ProductName order by day  limit 10000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select t, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, case when rnk <=5 then productname else 'Other' end as productname from( select t, PretaxAmount, productname, rank() over(partition by t order by PretaxAmount desc) as rnk from(select date_format(t,'%b, %Y') as t , PretaxAmount, productname from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as t, sum(PretaxAmount) as pretaxamount , productname from instance_bill  where productcode like '%%' group by t, productname having t >= date_add('month', -2, date_trunc('month',now()))) order by t)) group by t, productname order by t limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select t, sum(PretaxAmount) as PretaxAmount, case when rnk <=5 then productname else 'Other' end as productname from( select t, PretaxAmount, productname, rank() over(partition by t order by PretaxAmount desc) as rnk from(select date_format(t,'%b, %Y') as t , PretaxAmount, productname from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as t, sum(PretaxAmount) as pretaxamount , productname from instance_bill  where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by t, productname having t >= date_add('month', -2, date_trunc('month',now()))) order by t)) group by t, productname order by t limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * | select date_format(day,'%b %e, %Y') as day, total,case when Item ='PayAsYouGoBill' then 'Pay-as-you-go' when item = 'SubscriptionOrder' then 'Subscription' when item = 'Refund' then 'Refund' when item = 'Adjustment' then  'Adjustment' else item end as "Billing_method" from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,Item from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day,Item order by day) limit 10000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * | select date_format(day,'%b %e, %Y') as day, total,case when Item ='PayAsYouGoBill' then 'Pay-as-you-go' when item = 'SubscriptionOrder' then 'Subscription' when item = 'Refund' then 'Refund' when item = 'Adjustment' then  'Adjustment' else item end as "Billing_method" from( select date_trunc('month',__time__) as day , sum(PretaxAmount) as total,Item from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day,Item order by day) limit 10000

display.displayName: Exception Check of Daily Bills (Blue Line: Actual Value. Red Line: Expected Value. Circle: Exception Point.)

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: *| select date_format(from_unixtime(time),'%b, %Y') as t, sum(predict) as "Forecast_expenses" from(select * from (select res.stamp as time, res.real as src, res.pred as predict  from  ( select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'], cast(86400 as bigint), cast(90 as bigint)) as res from (select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from instance_bill where productcode like '%%' group by day  order by day )  ) where day < lastday)))   where  time >=to_unixtime(date_trunc('month',now()) )  and time < to_unixtime(date_add('month',3,date_trunc('month',now()) ))) group by t order by t   limit 100000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: *| select date_format(from_unixtime(time),'%b, %Y') as t, sum(predict) as "Forecast_expenses" from(select * from (select res.stamp as time, res.real as src, res.pred as predict  from  ( select sls_inner_ts_regression(cast(day as bigint), total, array['total'], cast(86400 as bigint), cast(90 as bigint)) as res from (select * from ( select *, max(day) over() as lastday  from (select to_unixtime( date_trunc('day',__time__))  as day ,  sum(PretaxAmount) as total     from instance_bill where productcode like '${{ProductCode|%%}}' group by day  order by day )  ) where day < lastday)))   where  time >=to_unixtime(date_trunc('month',now()) )  and time < to_unixtime(date_add('month',3,date_trunc('month',now()) ))) group by t order by t   limit 100000
